Finding: Persistent four-tab layout violates the frozen contract of two primary root screens (Spaces & Chat).
UserImpact: High UX deviations; dashboard feel instead of a streamlined companion app.
WhyItMatters: Compromises the streamlined, swipeable companion screen design principles of Maxgravity.
RecommendedAction: Refactor Navigation tree. Remove Activity, Workspace, and Settings from the tab bar. Implement swipeable overlay panels for Settings and Activity, leaving only Spaces and Chat as root views.
AcceptanceTest: User launches app and sees only Spaces and active Chat threads, settings can be accessed by swiping.

Finding: SSL/TLS certificate verification is disabled, allowing MITM interception.
UserImpact: Extreme security hazard; network traffic can be sniffed or hijacked.
WhyItMatters: Breaks end-to-end transport layer security over local network.
RecommendedAction: Replace trust-all delegate. Include the bridge public key certificate fingerprint in the QR pairing payload, and perform certificate pinning on the client side.
AcceptanceTest: Connection fails if the bridge presents a certificate that does not match the pinned public key fingerprint.

Finding: Tab bar highlight uses forbidden blue accent.
WhyItMatters: Contract explicitly forbids any blue product accent.
RecommendedAction: Change the active tab foregroundStyle highlight from blue to white/off-white or standard graphite.
AcceptanceTest: Active tab icons are highlighted in off-white; no blue color is present.

Finding: Paired device secrets are written in plaintext JSON, while DPAPI encryption module remains unused.
UserImpact: Local database compromise could allow unauthorized device trust.
WhyItMatters: Protects trust registry from local reading/modifications.
RecommendedAction: Integrate dpapi.ts into FileTrustStore. Encrypt the device registry payload before writing it to trusted-devices.json on Windows.
AcceptanceTest: File trusted-devices.json contains Base64 encrypted blocks instead of plaintext hashes.

Finding: Device pairing request is trusted automatically without Windows desktop confirmation prompt.
UserImpact: Unauthorized device could pair silently if token is exposed.
WhyItMatters: Crucial trust-layer approval step is absent on host.
RecommendedAction: Block the trust endpoint response until the user explicitly confirms the connection via a Windows terminal prompt, tray dialog, or browser confirmation panel.
AcceptanceTest: Pairing request blocks until approved on desktop.

Finding: Spawn stdout is buffered until process exit rather than streamed.
UserImpact: Delay in visual streaming of initial agent responses.
WhyItMatters: Makes interactions feel sluggish during cold start.
RecommendedAction: Rewrite spawn handlers to parse and emit stdout chunks in real-time to the WebSocket client.
AcceptanceTest: UI shows incremental text updates immediately after task starts.

Finding: Steering message exists but actual agent permission approval resolution endpoints are missing.
UserImpact: Cannot approve or deny sensitive CLI agent permissions from iPhone.
WhyItMatters: Task remains stuck in 'Awaiting approval' state.
RecommendedAction: Implement /v1/tasks/:taskId/approvals/:approvalId/resolve REST endpoint to send approval resolution payload back to the running Antigravity agent process.
AcceptanceTest: Clicking approve on iPhone updates stage and resumes execution.

Finding: Avatar components use circles which are explicitly forbidden.
WhyItMatters: Brand guidelines explicitly require 'No avatar circles'.
RecommendedAction: Replace Circle avatar clip with a squircle or rounded rectangle layout.
AcceptanceTest: Google avatar displays as a rounded square/squircle.

Finding: App does not handle local connection failure gracefully.
UserImpact: Silent failures and errors if bridge goes offline.
WhyItMatters: Essential for reliable companion app diagnostics.
RecommendedAction: Add a dedicated full-screen Offline Screen that triggers when heartbeat connection fails.
AcceptanceTest: Killing bridge process shows offline banner immediately on iPhone.

Finding: Remote background Live Activity updates are blocked due to missing APNs setup.
UserImpact: Live Activity freezes when app enters background.
WhyItMatters: Needed for background task progress updates.
RecommendedAction: Configure Apple Push Notification service (APNs) and add widget extension to IPA.
AcceptanceTest: Live Activity updates seamlessly in background.
